```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)

# Carica i dati
decks <- read.csv("./datasets/DATASET-decks-TCG-3-six_months.csv")
tournaments <- read.csv("./datasets/DATASET-tournaments-TCG-3-six_months.csv")

# Calcola statistiche di composizione per ogni deck
deck_stats <- decks %>%
  group_by(deck_id) %>%
  summarise(
    num_unique_cards = n_distinct(name),
    avg_copies = mean(copies),
    var_copies = var(copies),
    archetype = first(archetype)
  )

# Unisci con i risultati del torneo (per confronto con performance)
deck_stats <- left_join(deck_stats, tournaments %>% dplyr::select(deck_id, placement), by = "deck_id")

# Visualizza la distribuzione della varietà dei mazzi
ggplot(deck_stats, aes(x = num_unique_cards)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "steelblue") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "number of different cards per deck", x = "n different cards", y = "number of decks")

# Relazione tra numero di carte uniche e piazzamento
ggplot(deck_stats, aes(x = num_unique_cards, y = placement)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "different cards vs placement", x = "n different cards", y = "placement (lower is better)")


regr = lm(deck_stats$placement ~ deck_stats$num_unique_cards)
summary(regr)
```
#NOTE test carte uniche nel deck con normale

```{r}
regr = lm(deck_stats$placement ~ deck_stats$num_unique_cards + deck_stats$archetype)
summary(regr)
```


r^2 is still low, unexplained data like good of players

piu la gente ha carte uniche, piu si posiziona meglio (avoida once per turn quindi ha piu play, more unpredictable)


trova lista di top 20 staple
```{r}
most_used_cards <- decks %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(count)) %>%
  head(20)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(reshape2)

# Carica il file esportato
df <- most_used_cards

# =======================
# BARPLOT PER ARCHETYPE
# =======================

# Riorganizza i dati in formato long per il barplot
df_long <- df %>%
  dplyr::select(card, starts_with("Top8.Decks"), everything()) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -(1:5), names_to = "Archetype", values_to = "Top8_Count") %>%
  filter(Top8_Count > 0)

# Grafico a barre
ggplot(df_long, aes(x = reorder(Card, Top8_Count), y = Top8_Count, fill = Archetype)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Top 20 Carte nei Top 8 per Archetype",
       x = "Carta", y = "Numero di Mazzi Top 8") +
  theme_minimal()

# =======================
# HEATMAP
# =======================

# Prepara i dati per la heatmap
heatmap_data <- df_long %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Archetype, values_from = Top8_Count, values_fill = 0)

# Converti in matrice per ggplot
heatmap_melt <- melt(heatmap_data, id.vars = "Card")

# Heatmap con valori
ggplot(heatmap_melt, aes(x = variable, y = reorder(Card, desc(Card)), fill = value)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "red") +
  geom_text(aes(label = value), size = 3) +
  labs(title = "Heatmap: Presenza Carte Top 20 nei Top 8 per Archetype",
       x = "Archetype", y = "Carta") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

```
